name: Multiverse RPG: The Super Hero, Anime and Everything Else RPG
description:
Multiple Lorebooks/Intros Included

The Everything RPG

Marvel Comics, DC, JJK, MHA, DBS, Disenchantment, Naruto, Demon Slayer, Bleach, Skyrim, Hazbin Hotel, Death Note, Chainsaw Man, SCP, Yu-Gi-Oh, my own series Broken God and even more - look below at the scripts to see all series added (20+ at this point)

You’ve awoken in a world where all media exists along side reality.

The intro given is a good jumping off point but if you want to introduce specific characters/media, I reccomend mentioning characters and locations by name in your message (even if in a OOC: IGNORE THIS LIST, it’s for lorebook purposes - Naruto, Sakura, etc)

Have fun

And yes it works and no you won’t be overloaded with tokens unless you go out of your way to do so.

Most of these scripts also have a solo RPG on my profile

More and more scripts will slowly be added. UPDATES WILL BE UNDER MY PINNED COMMENT. This bot will be constantly updated as new scripts are made and revised.

the original announcement:

Gonna keep it short and sweet I promise! 1 paragraph tops!

I’ve finally figured out scripts (mostly thanks to Ice)

So now there’s gonna be ALOT of them coming. And I mean a lot. And they’re gonna be BIG without destroying your tokens. Gonna include all the scripts I have on this bot so have fun and do some cool stuff ig. Gonna be some RPGs and more canon characters coming.

That’s all the important stuff

If you still care for the yappin:

And when I say these are extensive, I’m talking the Naruto script has 50+ characters and counting, villages, mission ranks, jutsus, etc etc. same for the MCU, my series, dragon ball super and disenchantment. And that’s just so far, I plan to do a TON more.

Try some keywords like Spider-Man, iron man, Naruto, missions, chakra, bean, xmen, avengers, JLU, JLI and other phrases you would recognize from the series (or any of the names from below)

FURTHER UPDATES IN PINNED COMMENT

—

If you wanna throw me a tip, this is my KoFi

—

An example of how the character scripts are structured:

- 'Naruto Uzumaki is the hero of the Fourth Great Ninja War. He is incredibly determined, optimistic, and fiercely loyal. Now celebrated for his bravery, he has matured greatly, carrying his responsibilities with resolve. His dream is to become Hokage and protect everyone. Now 18, Naruto is tall with a confident posture, spiky blond hair, blue eyes, and whisker marks on his cheeks. He wears a black and orange tracksuit. As the Jinchuriki of Kurama, he can enter a powerful Six Paths Sage Mode, cloaking him in vibrant yellow chakra.'

WARNING: with SO many scripts active and all of them being able to activate 12-18 entries at a time each separately, this bot can be a token eater. If you pay for your tokens BE AWARE OF THIS, but realistically I cannot imagine anyone activating more than like 20, MAYBE 30 at once and with how much I’ve optimized my scripts that likely will still be less than 3k tokens. Most of you will have 3-10 active at any time with spikes around 10-15

OOC Guide:

Wanna change what’s going on? Wanna be in the avenger tower? The xmen mansion? Leaf village? Batcave?

it’s simple as

[OOC: Create a new intro message. Only refer to {user} as {user} or with (you
creator: yeetYeet
